entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: Improved maize varieties Katumani and Makueni used in the study

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The measure of maize production used to evaluate the effectiveness of treatments

entities.name: SCENARIO ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analytical approach used to investigate the effects of conservation practices and fertilizers

entities.name: APSIM MODEL
entities.description: The agricultural production system simulation model used to generate data

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: Practices aimed at preserving soil and water to improve crop yield

entities.name: TIED RIDGES
entities.description: A specific soil and water conservation practice involving the creation of ridges to trap water

entities.name: MULCHING
entities.description: A specific soil and water conservation practice involving covering the soil surface

entities.name: NITROGEN FERTILIZATION
entities.description: The application of N fertilizers to enhance crop growth

entities.name: BELOW NORMAL SEASON
entities.description: Seasons characterized by rainfall less than 250 mm

entities.name: NORMAL SEASON
entities.description: Seasons characterized by rainfall between 250 and 350 mm

entities.name: ABOVE NORMAL SEASON
entities.description: Seasons characterized by rainfall of 350 mm or more

entities.name: KATUMANI
entities.description: A research site located in Machakos county, Eastern Kenya

entities.name: MAKINDU
entities.description: A research site located in Makueni county, Eastern Kenya

entities.name: MACHAKOS COUNTY
entities.description: A county in Eastern Kenya where Katumani is located

entities.name: MAKUENI COUNTY
entities.description: A county in Eastern Kenya where Makindu is located

entities.name: EASTERN KENYA
entities.description: The broader geographical region where the study was conducted

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: SEMI-ARID CLIMATE
entities.description: The climatic condition of the study area characterized by variable rainfall

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount of precipitation which defines the seasonal categories
